**2. Analyze the Image:**
*   **Header:**
    *   "Basel, den 23. September 1932." -> This is the date.
    *   "ER." -> This looks like a reference code or internal marking, possibly "Erinnerung" (Reminder) or a file reference. It's on the left.
    *   "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft" -> This is the company name.
    *   "Direktion" -> Department/Division.
    *   "BASEL" -> City.
    *   "Marktgasse 5." -> Address.

*   **Body Text:**
    *   "Ich komme auf Ihr Geehrtes vom 5. ds. zurück..." -> "I am responding to your esteemed letter of the 5th of this month..."
    *   "...dass der Vorstand sich in seiner Sitzung vom 22. ds. mit Ihrem Vorschlag betr. Darlehen vom Fr.33'000.- befasst hat." -> "...that the Board of Directors dealt with your proposal regarding a loan of Fr. 33,000 in its meeting of the 22nd of this month."
    *   "Der Vorstand ist bereit, auf den Vorschlag einzutreten, hat jedoch beschlossen, Sie vorerst um Mitteilung eines etwas detaillierteren Programms des von Ihnen in den nächsten Jahren in Aussicht genommenen Personenschiffahrtsbetriebes zu bitten." -> The Board is willing to proceed but asks for a detailed program for the passenger shipping business planned for the next few years.
    *   "Ferner möchte er nicht das gesamte Vermögen der Gesellschaft festlegen, sondern nur eine Summe von Fr.20'000.- bis Fr.25'000.- als Darlehen hingeben." -> Also, they don't want to commit the entire assets, but only a sum of Fr. 20,000 to Fr. 25,000 as a loan.
    *   "Herr Ryniker wird Ihnen noch mündlich nähere Mitteilungen machen." -> Mr. Ryniker will make further oral communications to you.
    *   "Ferner steht der Unterzeichnete für weitere Verhandlungen betr. die Bedingungen des Darlehens zu Ihrer Verfügung." -> The undersigned is available for further negotiations regarding loan conditions.

*   **Footer:**
    *   "In Hochachtung" -> Sincerely / With respect.
    *   No signature is visible at the bottom.

**3. Extract Information:**

*   **letter_title:** There isn't a formal title like "Letter of Application". It's a business letter. The subject matter is a loan proposal ("Darlehen"). The header "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft Direktion" acts as the letterhead. I will look for a subject line. There isn't a specific "Subject:" line, but the content is about a loan. I will leave it as null or perhaps infer from the content if appropriate, but usually, a title is explicit. Wait, looking closely at the top left "ER." might be a reference. Let's look for a title. There isn't one. I will set it to null.
*   **sender_persons:** The letter is from the "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft Direktion" (Basel Rhine Shipping Company Board of Directors). The text mentions "Herr Ryniker" will speak, and "der Unterzeichnete" (the undersigned) is available. However, the name of the undersigned is not printed at the bottom. The entity sending it is the company. So, "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft" or "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft Direktion".
*   **send_date:** "Basel, den 23. September 1932." -> 1932-09-23.
*   **receiver_persons:** The letter starts "Ich komme auf Ihr Geehrtes vom 5. ds. zurück..." (I am responding to your esteemed letter...). It doesn't name the recipient. It mentions "Herr Ryniker" (Mr. Ryniker) will speak to *them*. This implies the recipient is someone Mr. Ryniker knows, likely a bank or investor. But the name is not explicitly in the text as "Dear Mr. X". I will set this to null.

*   **sender_persons:** The letterhead says "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft Direktion". This is the organization. The specific person is "der Unterzeichnete" (the undersigned), whose name is cut off or not present. I will list the organization.
*   **send_date:** 1932-09-23.
*   **receiver_persons:** Not named.

Let's re-evaluate "sender_persons". The text says "Herr Ryniker wird Ihnen noch mündlich nähere Mitteilungen machen." This suggests Mr. Ryniker is an employee of the sender. The sender is the "Basler Rheinschiffahrts Aktiengesellschaft".

Let's re-evaluate "receiver_persons". The text refers to "Ihr Vorschlag" (your proposal). It doesn't name the person.

The prompt asks for "receiver_persons". Not named.
